title: QSL Internal Negative Binding Vector Manifest v1

public_claim_boundary.statement: This manifest is bounded internal negative evidence only and makes no public-readiness, crypto-complete, vector-complete, KEM-complete, signature-complete, identity-complete, transcript-complete, replay-proof, downgrade-proof, side-channel-free, vulnerability-free, bug-free, perfect-crypto, or external-review-complete claim.

secret_material_policy.checked_in_material: metadata, formal tokens, public-message descriptions, expected reject outcomes, and no-mutation expectations only

traceability.notes: Traceability is supporting-only and does not assert qsc/refimpl equivalence or formal-proof completion.

sections.description: qsc KEM, signature, transcript, replay, suite, stale identity, and rollback negative binding metadata.
Refimpl ML-DSA signature provider-boundary negative metadata and Err versus false classification cases.
Opaque formal-token mappings corresponding to NA-0478 bounded model scenarios.

vectors.title: Wrong peer KEM public key rejects
vectors.description: A1 carries a KEM public-key binding that does not match the authenticated peer public record.
source_evidence: NA-0476 wrong public key qsc negative test
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal negative metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Stale KEM public record rejects
vectors.description: A stale peer public record is replayed after identity rotation and must not replace existing trusted session state.
source_evidence: NA-0476 stale public-record qsc negative test
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal negative metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Wrong KEM ciphertext rejects
vectors.description: B1 carries a mutated KEM ciphertext token that must fail closed before A2 or session completion.
source_evidence: NA-0476 wrong ciphertext qsc negative test
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal negative metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Wrong KEM key and ciphertext pairing rejects
vectors.description: A generated test pairs public KEM metadata and ciphertext metadata from incompatible sessions.
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal negative metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Wrong signature identity public record rejects
vectors.description: Signature public-record material does not match the authenticated identity binding.
source_evidence: NA-0476 wrong signature public-record qsc negative test
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal negative metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Cross-message signature replay rejects
vectors.description: A signature captured from an A2 context is replayed into a B1 context and must not validate.
source_evidence: NA-0476 cross-message signature replay qsc negative test
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal negative metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Wrong signature message context rejects
vectors.description: Signature metadata is valid only for a different message context and must fail binding validation.
source_evidence: NA-0476 cross-message replay qsc negative test
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal negative metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Tampered signature rejects
vectors.description: A well-shaped signature token is mutated and must not validate as a successful binding.
source_evidence: NA-0481 tampered signature invalid false test
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal negative metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Wrong signature public key rejects
vectors.description: A well-shaped signature is verified against the wrong signature public-key metadata.
source_evidence: NA-0481 wrong public key invalid false test
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal negative metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Transcript mutation rejects
vectors.description: A public transcript-bound field is changed after B1 construction and must reject before A2 or session completion.
source_evidence: NA-0476 transcript mutation qsc negative test
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal negative metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Transcript truncation rejects
vectors.description: A public frame or transcript-bound section is truncated and must fail closed at parse or binding validation.
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal negative metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Replayed A1 rejects
vectors.description: A1 replay after first observation must not emit another B1 or create duplicate state.
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal negative metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Replayed B1 rejects
vectors.description: B1 replay after pending or completed handling must not create duplicate A2 output or mutate a completed session.
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal negative metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Replayed A2 rejects
vectors.description: A2 replay must not convert a prior completed session into another success or mutate completed state unexpectedly.
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal negative metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Wrong-role replay rejects
vectors.description: A message valid for one handshake role is replayed into the opposite role context and must not succeed.
source_evidence: NA-0478 role and replay token mapping
qsc role transition evidence from NA-0476
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal negative metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Wrong suite token rejects
vectors.description: A Suite-2 required handshake sees a wrong suite token and must reject without silent fallback.
source_evidence: NA-0476 suite confusion qsc negative test
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal negative metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Downgrade-style wrong suite block rejects
vectors.description: The public suite parameter block is replaced with a lower or incompatible suite token and must not silently fall back.
source_evidence: NA-0476 suite block replacement qsc negative test
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal negative metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Stale public-record replay rejects
vectors.description: An older public record is replayed after a newer trusted record exists and must preserve existing session bytes.
source_evidence: NA-0476 stale public-record qsc negative test
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal negative metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Public-record rollback rejects
vectors.description: A public record is rolled back to older metadata after identity state advanced.
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal negative metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Identity rotation stale peer state rejects
vectors.description: A peer retains stale identity state after rotation and must not accept a mismatched binding.
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal negative metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Stale trusted pin mismatch rejects
vectors.description: Trusted signature pin metadata no longer matches the peer public record and must reject.
source_evidence: NA-0476 contact signature pin mutation evidence
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal negative metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Wrong public-key length returns error
vectors.description: Refimpl signature verification rejects malformed public-key length with an error classification.
source_evidence: NA-0481 wrong public-key length provider-boundary test
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal provider-boundary metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Wrong signature length returns error
vectors.description: Refimpl signature verification rejects malformed signature length with an error classification.
source_evidence: NA-0481 wrong signature length provider-boundary test
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal provider-boundary metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Malformed signing key returns error
vectors.description: Refimpl signing rejects malformed signing-key length with an error classification; the manifest stores no signing-key bytes.
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal provider-boundary metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Tampered signature returns invalid false
vectors.description: Refimpl verification treats a well-shaped tampered signature as invalid false, not success.
source_evidence: NA-0481 tampered signature invalid provider-boundary test
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal provider-boundary metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Wrong public key returns invalid false
vectors.description: Refimpl verification treats a well-shaped wrong public key as invalid false, not success.
source_evidence: NA-0481 wrong public key invalid provider-boundary test
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal provider-boundary metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Err versus false classification remains distinct
vectors.description: Malformed inputs are error classifications while well-shaped invalid signature inputs return false.
source_evidence: NA-0481 Err versus false classification provider-boundary test
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Internal provider-boundary metadata only; not public or conformance evidence and not a completion claim.

vectors.title: Wrong KEM token maps to reject
vectors.description: Opaque formal wrong KEM token maps to a fail-closed reject with no completed-session mutation.
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Formal-token mapping only; not provider-internal proof or completion evidence.

vectors.title: Wrong signature token maps to reject
vectors.description: Opaque formal wrong signature or wrong signature context token maps to fail-closed reject behavior.
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Formal-token mapping only; not provider-internal proof or completion evidence.

vectors.title: Transcript mutation token maps to reject
vectors.description: Opaque formal transcript mutation token maps to fail-closed reject behavior.
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Formal-token mapping only; not provider-internal proof or completion evidence.

vectors.title: Replay token maps to reject
vectors.description: Opaque formal replay token maps to fail-closed reject behavior and no duplicate success output.
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Formal-token mapping only; not provider-internal proof or completion evidence.

vectors.title: Suite confusion token maps to reject
vectors.description: Opaque formal wrong suite token maps to fail-closed reject behavior without fallback.
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Formal-token mapping only; not provider-internal proof or completion evidence.

vectors.title: Stale public-record token maps to reject
vectors.description: Opaque formal stale public-record token maps to fail-closed reject behavior.
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Formal-token mapping only; not provider-internal proof or completion evidence.

vectors.title: No completed-session mutation on reject
vectors.description: Opaque formal reject paths preserve completed-session state and produce no success output.
source_evidence: NA-0478 no success output on reject assertions
vectors.public_claim_caveat: Formal-token mapping only; not provider-internal proof or completion evidence.
